deploy.startCommand: python -c "import django;import os;os.environ.setdefault('DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE','config.settings');django.setup();from django.contrib.staticfiles.storage import staticfiles_storage;print(f'STORAGE CLASS: {type(staticfiles_storage._wrapped).__name__}');print(f'MRO: {[c.__name__ for c in type(staticfiles_storage._wrapped).__mro__]}')" && python manage.py collectstatic --noinput && python manage.py migrate --noinput && python manage.py seed_data && gunicorn config.wsgi:application --bind 0.0.0.0:$PORT --workers 3 --timeout 120
